About

Built for
Brands That
Move Fast.

Cyber is a digital growth agency specializing in TikTok Shop marketing, UGC content creation, and custom web design. We don't chase vanity metrics — we generate measurable revenue for the brands we work with.

Whether you need a website that converts first-time visitors into customers, or a TikTok Shop strategy that floods your product page with buyers, we engineer every move around one goal: growth.

Services

What We Do

01

Web
Design

Your website is your first impression — and most websites are losing clients every single day. We rebuild and redesign sites to attract, engage, and convert new customers from the moment they land.

  • Full Website Redesigns
  • Conversion-Focused Layouts
  • Mobile-First Responsive Design
  • Modern UI that Attracts New Clients
  • Landing Pages & Sales Funnels
  • SEO-Ready Architecture
  • Fast Deployment on Netlify / Vercel
02

TikTok
Marketing

We specialize in TikTok Shop strategy and UGC content that drives real sales. Our campaigns have generated over $100K in revenue for brands — through organic reach, affiliate networks, and high-converting UGC.

  • TikTok Shop Setup & Strategy
  • UGC Content Creation & Direction
  • TikTok Affiliate & Creator Outreach
  • Viral Product Video Scripts
  • Paid TikTok Ads (Spark Ads)
  • Analytics & Revenue Tracking
  • Social Media Growth Strategy

Process

How We Work

01

Discovery

We audit your brand, product, website, and current online presence. We identify the exact gaps costing you customers and revenue.

02

Strategy

We map out a custom growth plan — whether that's a full site redesign, a TikTok Shop launch, a UGC content campaign, or all three.

03

Execute

We build, create, and launch. Clean code, scroll-stopping content, and campaigns engineered for measurable results — on time, every time.

04

Scale

We analyze the data, optimize what works, and double down. Your growth compounds — and we're with you every step of the way.
